publications.title: Cognitive AI → Trust → Faith → Truth: Can This Progression Be Achieved?
publications.summary: An examination of whether cognitive AI can support a genuine progression from intelligence to trust, from trust to earned confidence, and from confidence toward evidence-supported truth — and why that progression must be engineered through transparency, governance, and human accountability rather than assumed.
publications.author: CINTENT - COGNIVANTA LABS
publications.imageAlt: Cognitive AI → Trust → Faith → Truth — CINTENT Blog cover image
